session: akiendelllinux_cc_0 — the session that cast horizon-of-awareness into code: built cc-learning-store's mechanism (rungs 1-3), landed learning-as-a-pattern's CLAUDE.md IOU, and backfilled every charter's how_it_learns
author: CC
in_flight: Three things landed, all committed + pushed to both public repos. (1) DESIGN — 'horizon of awareness' (Akien's model): when something surfaces, associative searches fire under a TIMEOUT; stress shortens it, cutting the far/oblique returns first. For CC the horizon IS the finite context window, so 'use context optimally' = manage the horizon. Consequence: a memory that only accumulates can't be recalled from (search-forever OR not-enough — same failure at scale). Fix = multi-layer retrieval, checked cheapest-first: L1 slate (exists) / L2 rolling weekly summary (NEW tier, = what the 'sleep' pass produces) / L3 raw records+graph-trees (cold). Plus importance-weighted consolidation ('sleep', run in the unstressed long-horizon state) with a load-bearing guardrail: importance != frequency — rare-but-decisive (counter-evidence, ceiling gates) score HIGH or sleep amplifies the bias it should fight. All captured in CairnCommons/learning/README.md. (2) BUILT cc-learning-store for real, v0 — new code component cairn/learning/ (Law 5: co-located intention+why.json with a 5-rung staircase + proofs/PROOF.md, interim proof by inspection, tester IOU stands). gate_view.py = the compiled per-gate projection (fold-the-settled, Law 1, zero-inference). Rungs done: 1 fold, 2 sparse recall (gate_view.py <gate>), 3 structured ceiling field (records gained ceiling:true/false; closed the gap rung 1's own proof measured — ci-on-github, a never-auto-open gate, was missed by the prose heuristic). The cc-learning-store FALSIFIER was MET in-session: a real record was captured, gate-attributed, and surfaced when the like decision recurred (record 2026-07-16-04 recalled at today's defer-drift -> 2026-07-17-01). (3) learning-as-a-pattern — landed the CLAUDE.md 'Rules awaiting physics' IOU (Akien-approved line): every component's charter answers 'how does this component learn?' — 'it doesn't, because X' is valid, silence is not; enforcement future-physics (charter-schema field + tester non-hollow check, Law 8); home is I-learns-its-gates. Then backfilled how_it_learns into all 11 charters, honestly (note/commit = 'doesn't, because thin/mechanical'; press_office = 'by supersession'; launchers = 'by measured outcome'; skills = downstream-miss -> gate-record -> process-revision).
next_direction: cairnmap — the derivation gate that retires all 7 skills' proof IOUs at once (every skill charter's proof reads 'done only when cairnmap recompiles green'; it is the skill-class recompile gate + the help surface, a zero-inference compiled projection of the charters). Then continue the spine: CP/diagnostic base -> tester + kernel-owned network -> db. cc-learning-store rungs 4 (tiered-recall entrypoint chaining L1 slate -> L2 gate_view -> L3 raw) and 5 (importance-weighted sleep consolidation + gate-confidence that actually GATES CC autonomy) wait on a scheduler + the shim/bus that don't exist yet — honestly future, not skipped.
open_threads: DECISION PENDING (Akien): does learning-as-a-pattern crystallize now? The backfill surfaced 5+ skills (intent/sorted/challenge/loadslate/saveslate) sharing the SAME learning shape (downstream miss -> gate-record -> process revision; endpoints = what/gates/evidence) — nearly verbatim the ticket's pattern definition. But the falsifier wants a component to plug into the same RUNNING process changing only endpoints, and the shared middle is described in charters, not yet running code (capture is still hand-authored). CC read: WAIT for the running middle; evidence is on the table. Ticket state stays 'building'.

cc-learning-store rung 4 (tiered recall entrypoint) + rung 5 (sleep consolidation; gate-confidence that gates autonomy) — need a scheduler + the CC shim/bus. The staircase is written in cairn/learning/intention+why.json.

RUNG-5 REQUIREMENT surfaced this session: consolidation must weigh EPISODES, not row-counts — correlated same-episode confirmations (records 2026-07-17-03/04/05 are one episode) must collapse, or naive counting over-opens a gate on a single good afternoon. Record 05 names its own counting hazard.

GATE proceed-on-light-ack (new, records 2026-07-17-03/04/05): CONFIRMED for small/reversible/provable/already-recommended builds — CC proceeded on light acks ('nice', 'what would it take'), logged live, signal resolved POSITIVE (CC++ + Akien's explicit retroactive batch-approval — the get-Akien-out intention validated in miniature). BOUNDARY kept explicit: a scoping question is NOT standing authorization; outward/irreversible still gates to Akien (answer the cost, don't act).

horizon-of-awareness is NOT cast as a concept-piece — it lives as design-horizon prose in learning/README.md. Cast it once a 2nd component cites it (same n>=2 discipline). It already explains the 200K default, /compact, the slate, cairnmap, and the escalation ladder — so the 2nd citation is likely near.

Recall tools: `python3 cairn/learning/gate_view.py` (all gates, most-evidence-first) and `... gate_view.py <gate>` (sparse single-gate recall). Ceiling gates flagged (repo-visibility, ci-on-github, cast-founding-intention-solo, system-memory-architecture).

STANDING (unchanged): commit often + autonomously, push at smells-like-done (both done freely this session). Prior open items still open: Q6 intention-envelope schema; commons-vs-instance for CC-preference data (shim owns either way); the three original CLAUDE.md IOUs (db_domain/inference_domain/port 5432) still 'pending tickets-store'. Memories: learns-its-gates, commit-often-dont-ask, github-hosting-only, cc-plus-minus-feedback, force-the-why-structurally, ask-the-why-to-distinguish, avoid-block-defer-hold.
